scripts.build: cp .yarnrc-lambda.yml .yarnrc.yml && yarn workspaces focus --production && zip -rq package.zip . -x .yarnrc.yml .yarnrc-lambda.yml && rm .yarnrc.yml
scripts.update: aws lambda update-function-code --function-name imageProcessor --s3-bucket centralbeans-artifacts --s3-key image-processor/package.zip --publish
scripts.deploy: yarn upload > /dev/null && yarn update > /dev/null && yarn run version
